sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Orbital salvage and flight variants
queue.reason: Only expand orbital play if future work adds richer orbital mechanics, nonvisual field narration, cooperative crew roles, docking geometry, procedural contracts, or deeper component repair rather than more salvage labels.

queue.title: Textile design and craft variants
queue.reason: Only expand textile play if future work adds authentic weaving structures, nonvisual pattern narration, cooperative loom roles, richer material properties, culturally grounded pattern context, or local pattern import with explicit consent rather than more palettes.

queue.title: Emergency shelter operations variants
queue.reason: Only expand shelter operations if future work adds collaborative roles, multilingual and screen-reader-ready briefings, reunification workflows, trauma-informed privacy choices, richer utility failures, or consent-based local plan import rather than more household labels.

queue.title: Mutual-aid logistics variants
queue.reason: Only expand neighborhood food support if future work adds cooperative volunteer roles, culturally specific food preferences, accessible inventory narration, donation forecasting, local-expiry import with explicit consent, or richer refrigeration failures rather than more item labels.

queue.title: Inclusive product testing variants
queue.reason: Only expand accessibility simulation if future work adds authentic assistive-technology narration, collaborative design and engineering roles, richer severity and dependency models, localization, or imported local prototypes with explicit consent rather than more defect labels.

queue.title: Creative audio and performance variants
queue.reason: Only expand creative audio if future work adds accessible waveform narration, multi-performer collaboration, richer spatial mixing, recorded-input consent controls, procedural scoring, or deeper arrangement systems rather than more sound labels.

queue.title: Negotiation and coalition variants
queue.reason: Only expand civic negotiation if future work adds multi-player roles, explicit public testimony, accessibility-first deliberation summaries, procedural rules, misinformation response, or deeper long-term policy consequences rather than more proposal labels.

queue.title: Emergency communications variants
queue.reason: Only expand emergency communications if future work adds voice-procedure parsing, multi-operator coordination, accessible spectrum narration, encryption ethics, terrain-aware propagation, or richer message compression rather than more incident labels.

queue.title: Volcano observatory variants
queue.reason: Only expand volcano monitoring if future work adds multi-station triangulation, explicit uncertainty intervals, accessible chart narration, community-specific evacuation ethics, ash and lahar routing, or richer eruption styles rather than more sensor labels.

queue.title: Cultural preservation variants
queue.reason: Only expand archive preservation if future work adds multi-object triage, provenance ethics, nonvisual condition-map narration, community repatriation choices, richer material chemistry, or cooperative treatment planning rather than more artifact labels.

queue.title: Chemistry construction variants
queue.reason: Only expand chemistry play if future work adds isomer goals, reaction balancing, nonvisual structure narration, laboratory safety tradeoffs, cooperative synthesis, or richer electron and charge models rather than more molecule labels.

queue.title: Kitchen orchestration variants
queue.reason: Only expand kitchen management if future work adds dietary constraints, cooperative roles, richer station dependencies, accessible timer narration, inventory forecasting, or multi-course pacing rather than more recipe labels.

recentDecisions.title: Orbital Salvage Yard 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local spatial salvage game with real-time flight, drifting debris, contract manifests, fuel, heat, cargo mass, hull damage, repair, scoring, adaptive modes, session unlocks, touch, pointer and keyboard controls, optional local audio, reduced-motion behavior, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Loom Logic Studio 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local textile-design strategy game with a tactile weaving grid, four pattern briefs, symmetry, rhythm, clustering, contrast, limited thread, snag repair, adaptive modes, session unlocks, touch, pointer and keyboard controls, optional local audio, reduced-motion behavior, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Shelter Shift 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local emergency-shelter operations game with household placement, accessibility and privacy needs, pets, capacity, staffing, supplies, power incidents, trust, adaptive modes, session progression, touch, pointer and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, and teardown.

recentDecisions.title: Access Path Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Added a local accessibility repair simulator with three product flows, five user perspectives, linked barriers, limited engineering time, confidence, technical debt, tests, regressions, release gates, recovery, adaptive modes, session unlocks, touch, pointer and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, and teardown.
